emails.body: understood. I think Kayne needs some help in working through MDEA. Kay To: Mann, Kay

emails.subject: RE: X-mas Party at Bagwell's
emails.body: They are talking termination, which may not be justified for the asset management deal. Don't know whether that would be a good thing or not. To: Mann, Kay
